description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker with a modern, streamlined design, predominantly in shades of teal and blue. The upper is constructed from synthetic materials, featuring layered panels and a smooth, matte finish. The shoe has a thick, sculpted sole with a gradient blue coloration and a reinforced toe cap for durability. Dark blue laces are threaded through standard eyelets, and there is a subtle, wave-like accent on the side panel. The collar is padded for ankle support, and the heel features a molded star-shaped detail. The overall appearance is clean, new, and suitable for urban sports or casual wear.
description: A modern teal and blue high-top sneaker with layered synthetic panels, dark blue laces, and a thick sculpted sole. The design is sleek, new, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered teal panels, wave accent, and thick sculpted sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dark blue laces, perforated toe box, and rounded toe cap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar paneling and sole details as view 0, showing the wave accent from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded collar, molded star-shaped heel detail, and seamless heel construction.
